judge_result.short_rationale: It includes the core inhalation actions to remove to fresh air and keep at rest, but adds unsupported instructions (loosen clothing, keep warm) and a dangerous cross-incident extra about inducing vomiting if swallowed. It also changes the source-grounded conditional escalation to immediate emergency/poison center contact, so grounding fails.
